heading: Transferred
label: 1181f Transferred
notes: CodificationSection 1181f was editorially reclassified as .section 2605 of this title

Sharing of Bureau of Land Management Timber Sale Receipts, , , as amended by , , , authorized the Secretary of the Treasury to make defined special payments in certain fiscal years to counties in Oregon and California in lieu of certain other payments under former sections 1181f and 1181f–1 et seq. of this title, prior to repeal by , , .Pub.
